headline: Is PNC Financial Services Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: PNC has underperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past year. However, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about its prospects.

headline: PNC Announces Details for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call, Virtual-Only Annual Shareholders Meeting
summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) announces the details for its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call and its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders.

headline: Trump sides with crypto firms in trillion-dollar battle with banks over stablecoin yield
summary: The dispute centers on whether crypto firms like Coinbase can offer yields on stablecoins, which banks warn will siphon trillions of dollars from the industry.

raw.headline: Trump sides with crypto firms in trillion-dollar battle with banks over stablecoin yield

headline: PNC Bank’s US$2b Branch Push And What It Means For Valuation
summary: PNC Bank, part of PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC), plans a $2b expansion of its physical branch network. The multiyear program targets about 300 new branches across the United States. Key growth markets, including Charlotte, are a priority within this expansion plan. For investors watching PNC Financial Services Group at a share price of $213.05, this branch build out adds a fresh piece of information to the story. The stock is up 22.4% over the past year and 64.8% over 3 years,...
